successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest and CreateLeaveRequestDto interfaces
src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance interface
src/shared/types/index.ts exists and exports LeaveType, LeaveStatus, NotificationStatus, and FiscalYear types
All model files compile with TypeScript without errors
All interfaces match the canonical SQL schema column names and types
ARCHITECTURE.md is updated to include the new domain concepts: LeaveType, LeaveStatus, NotificationStatus, and FiscalYear

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
